import { Component } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-auth-layout', templateUrl: './auth-layout.component.html' }) export class AuthLayoutComponent { }
R

ResumeAI

Career cockpit for faster applications

Candidate Workspace

Build, score, and tailor resumes inside one focused workflow.

The product now follows a more structured page flow: guided onboarding, cleaner builder screens, sharper dashboards, and upgrade prompts that feel product-led instead of generic.

ATS readiness

82 / 100

Track resume quality and fix weak sections before applying.

Match precision

12 live roles

Surface role-fit gaps with matched and missing skills side by side.

Live Builder

Structured content, cleaner decisions

  • Multi-step resume forms aligned to real section priorities.
  • Dedicated preview space with editing and download checkpoints.
  • Upgrade states integrated into the flow rather than isolated pages.
